$comment: SSOT catalog mirrors (root <-> classpath copy) that must stay in sync. Production loads the classpath copy under modules/adapters-lucene/src/main/resources/, so any divergence silently drops content in packaged builds (CLAUDE.md 'Classpath catalog drift' pitfall). 'aliases.v1.json' is intentionally root-only (not dual-copied) and is not listed. kind: 'json' compares parsed structure (order-insensitive); 'text' compares CRLF-normalized. Adding a newly-dual-copied catalog is a deliberate entry here.

mirrors.$comment: Tempdoc 633 #6 — the model registry the Head loads at runtime (ui main resource) and the configuration-module test copy that ModelRegistryLoaderTest exercises must not diverge, else the test validates a registry production never sees.
